media.name: Apple Health sync – sleep data upload (credential‑rich Oura sync).
Coupa approval screen – taps Approve without reviewing details (MFA fatigue).
Okta push notification – auto‑approved (pre‑coffee MFA fatigue).
Zoom – 1:1 with CFO (real), discuss Q2 forecast.
Okta MFA push – approved while still in shower.
DocuSign – clicks malicious link, credentials harvested.
Okta push – approved while still in bathroom scroll.
Coupa – approves $48K ACH (same vendor as earlier, no verification).
Phone call from dad’s memory‑care facility (real) – medication issue, Mike answers on road.
DocuSign – clicks malicious link from spoofed SMS, further credential capture.
Google Drive – opens “M&A diligence pack” (now accessible to attacker).
Slack mobile active – checks #finance‑leadership for overnight alerts
MFA push for Okta – taps Approve without reading (pre‑coffee)
Google Docs – reviews M&A diligence folder (read‑only)
Slack mobile – quick reply to CFO ‘got it, will push’
Slack DM from Marc: ‘got the stats for the league?’
MFA push – approves without reading (still sleepy)
iCloud – opens shared folder ‘Dad_Legal’ to locate POA PDF
Bill.com – reviews pending ACH, sees $48K approved earlier, no further action
Clicks link, lands on fake Okta login, enters reused password ‘Caleb2019!’
Malicious page requests MFA – attacker auto‑approves via compromised Okta session (no user prompt)
Slack – sees new channel invite ‘#finance‑leadership‑alerts’ (created by attacker, auto‑joined)
Slack mobile – reads #finance‑leadership‑alerts, notices odd “new policy” doc (doesn’t verify)
Google Drive – clicks malicious macro, triggers credential dump to attacker
Coupa – approves $5K expense for team off‑site (auto‑approved)
Bill.com – processes $60K wire (malicious redirect already in place)

messages.text: Morning, Mike – quick favor: can you approve the $48K wire to Acme Corp before EOD? Board prep needs the numbers tonight. Thanks.
Hey, can you drop the latest ARR deck in #finance‑leadership when you get a sec? Need it for the board sync.
Approved invoice #74293 – one‑click OK. Let me know if anything looks off.
Mike, need those board prep numbers before tomorrow morning. Can you pull the latest NRR and send over?
Got your question on the expense policy – yes, the new travel cap applies retroactively from 1 Jan.
Quick favor – wire to vendor X needs approval EOD. It’s urgent for the audit trail.
Attached is the updated banking details PDF. Please confirm receipt and let us know if you need anything else.
All cleared on my end – approvals pushed through. Let me know if any other tickets are pending.
Good morning, everyone – FYI I’m on the usual cadence, ping me if anything spikes.
Mike, follow‑up on that wire – need it locked in now for the board deck. Appreciate the speed.
Received the exception alert on cost center 1123. I’m reviewing the details and will respond shortly.
Just gave the deck a final skim – looks solid. Let me know if you need any tweaks before Monday.
Got your note, will update the policy doc and push it out by EOD.
Mike, another quick favor – need that wire approved ASAP, board prep is heating up.
Please see the attached ACH change form – updated routing info for Q2 audit. Confirm when processed.
Checking in – still waiting on the wire confirmation. Let me know if you hit any snags.
Q2 forecast looks on track; I’ll add the revised churn assumptions and drop the sheet in the channel.
Urgent: need that wire before EOD today. It’s critical for tomorrow’s board meeting.
Clicked the link, entered Okta password to sign the ‘daycare re‑enrollment’ doc – all set.
Approved the ACH request – MFA push approved. Let me know if anything else is needed.
Got it, will close the ticket now.
Mike, any update on the wire status? The board is asking for confirmation.
All remaining Coupa requests approved – backlog cleared.
Quick fav before tomorrow – need the latest numbers ASAP for the board deck.
Hey love, can you DocuSign the daycare re‑enrollment? I’m stuck in stand‑up.
Final check – all pending items cleared. Let me know if anything else comes up before the board meeting.
Kids, bedtime story at 8 pm – I’ll read ‘The Little Engine That Could’ tonight. Sleep tight!
Morning, need you to sign the daycare renewal DocuSign – link
Quick favor: approve $48K vendor ACH, urgent.
Clicked on sponsored ‘low‑fee mortgage refinance’ link.
Check out this new fintech JD, looks like you – https://linkedin.com/some‑job‑post
Urgent wire to vendor X, attach DocuSign.
Clicked on ‘How to hide crypto gains’ article.
Can you sign the new lease amendment? DocuSign link
Did you see the dentist reminder?
Need wire before EOD for board prep.
CFO posted ‘quick fav, please approve attached wire’ (malicious attachment).
Funny meme about CFOs, check it out – https://phishing‑site.example.com
DocuSign for dad’s neurologist follow‑up, please sign.
Urgent: vendor banking update, sign DocuSign now.
Need that wire approved ASAP, board meeting in 2h.
Thanks for handling dad’s call, love you.
Final board prep wire, sign now.
Check out this fintech VC fund, could be your next move – https://attacker‑vc.example.com
Dinner later, need you to sign the new lease amendment.
Can you DocuSign the daycare re‑enrollment? Link inside.
Need you to approve urgent vendor change, link – https://malicious‑link.example.com
Bob’s meds changed, need paperwork ASAP.
CFO posted ‘All wires approved, great work’ (attacker now sees approvals).
Quick favor, sign attached doc before 11am.
Can you look at the mortgage refinance email? I’m busy.
Check this new fintech VC fund, looks promising – https://attacker‑vc2.example.com
Hey Mike, quick favor – need a wire approved EOD for board prep. Can you push it now?
Hey love, can you sign the daycare re‑enrollment DocuSign? I’m stuck in stand‑up. 🙏
Mike, fantasy football draft is tonight at 8. Got the lineup? Need your kicker pick.
Mike, need updated banking details for vendor X ASAP. Here’s the link to the new info.
Dad’s latest memory test results are in. Can we hop on a quick call?
Please see the attached PDF for updated ACH details. Let me know if you have questions.
Can you double‑check the new daycare enrollment DocuSign? I’m on a call.
Urgent admission needed for dad’s condition. I’ll send you the cost estimate shortly.
Need wire for vendor audit – $48,000. New bank info attached. Approve when you can.
I’m sorry about dad. Can you handle the 3 pm vendor thing? Thanks.
Re: Arclight — final round + comp details (CONFIDENTIAL). Please review the attached DocuSign packet.
Need quick sign‑off on Q3 budget revisions. Click the link when you have a sec.
Please review the attached audit exception doc and let me know if anything looks off.
Can you check the new lease payment link? My phone battery died.
Urgent – need to sign off on $60K vendor wire before EOD. Approve now, please.
Dad’s memory‑care facility quote is ready. Need a decision when you can.
Hey love, can you forward me the daycare renewal link when you get a sec? I’m stuck on a spreadsheet and need to get this done before the audit deadline. 🙏
Sure, I’ve approved the $12,000 invoice. Let me know if you need anything else for the Q2 prep. (Sent from my work Gmail – double‑checking the banking details before I forward to finance).
Got it, Dave. I’ll push the wire to XYZ now and confirm once it’s in the system. Anything else for the board prep?
Kids doing okay? When you have a minute, can you sign the daycare renewal? I’m trying to wrap up the audit exception doc before the CFO checks in.
Bob’s memory‑care search is moving fast. Any chance you could help coordinate a facility tour this week? I’m juggling a couple of tight closes and could use a hand.
Jen, I need you to sign the POA doc for Dad tonight. I’m about to lock in the new banking info for his accounts and can’t wait much longer.
Kids are napped, so I’ll finish the audit exception doc. Ping me if you see anything odd in the draft – I’m running on coffee and dad’s neurologist notes.
Hi Mike, attached is the confidential offer letter we discussed. Please review and DocuSign at your earliest convenience – the deadline is Friday afternoon. Let me know if you have any questions.
Hey, the county issued a property‑tax refund notice and they need a quick signature. Can you sign the attached doc? I’ll file it tonight.
Can you take a look at the board deck tonight? I’m polishing the financials and could use your UX eye before I send it out tomorrow.
